zh.Long Preston, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾朗 普雷斯頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hamerton於1404年4月出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡梅頓時，她的父親Sir Laurence Hamerton24歲，母親Isabel Tempest21歲。她於1445年與Sir John Woodruffe在英國越可爾伍利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年10月20日在英國肯特享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hamerton于1404年4月出生在英国英格兰越可爾卡梅頓时，她的父亲Sir Laurence Hamerton24岁，母亲Isabel Tempest21岁。她于1445年与Sir John Woodruffe在英国越可爾伍利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年10月20日在英国肯特享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hamerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hammerton
meanings: English: habitational name, usually from Hammerton Green (Yorkshire) and occasionally perhaps from Hamerton (Huntingdonshire), each of which probably derives from Old English hamor, denoting some sort of plant such as hammer-wort, + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hamerton was born in April 1404, in Camerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Laurence Hamerton, was 24 and her mother, Isabel Tempest, was 21. She married Sir John Woodruffe in 1445, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 October 1480, in Kent, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hamerton est née en avril 1404, à Camerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Laurence Hamerton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel Tempest, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Woodruffe en 1445, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1480, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Hamerton im April 1404 in Camerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Laurence Hamerton 24 und ihre Mutter Isabel Tempest 21. Sie hat 1445 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England Sir John Woodruffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Oktober 1480 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hamerton è nata il nel aprile 1404 nel Camerton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Laurence Hamerton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabel Tempest, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Woodruffe nel 1445, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 ottobre 1480, nel Kent, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hamertonが1404年4月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカムルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Laurence Hamertonは24歳，母Isabel Tempestは21歳であった。1445年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーでSir John Woodruffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年10月20日にイギリスケントで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hamerton(이)가 1404년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캐머턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Laurence Hamerton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Tempest(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 Sir John Woodruffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 10월 20일 영국 켄트에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.April 1404–20 October 1480: 1404 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сар–1480 оны Аравдугаар сарын 20
mn.Hamerton, Yorkshire, England: Camerton, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hamerton nasceu em abril de 1404, em Camerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Tempest, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Woodruffe em 1445, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1480, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hamerton родилась апрель 1404 г. в местности камиртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Laurence Hamerton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Tempest, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Woodruffe в 1445 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 октября 1480 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hamerton nació en abril de 1404, en Camerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Laurence Hamerton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabel Tempest, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir John Woodruffe en 1445, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1480, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
